raw_consumer_statement: I purchased a laptop on XX/XX/year> at BestBuy with my Best Buy Credit card. I canceled that order, but they kep billing me for it. I called twice and was placed on hold about 7 times and was eventually told that they would correct het issue and I was still beign charged. I used their from online to submit a dispute for the change, and a few weks later I got a response that they will remove the charge, but they still did not remove the charge. I'm hoping for some assistance with getting Best Buy Credit Card to remove the charge for an order that was canceled months ago.
